story: I entered 76 East 63rd and fired a warning shot to break up a fight between a dog and two monkeys. As I spoke, a large boa constrictor slid down the staircase.. I sent the monkeys upstairs. The shot woke the building; on the second floor an elderly woman called out that she’d heard gunfire. I started up to reassure her when shouting on the fifth floor drew me away.
character: The elderly woman on the second floor
implausible_knowledge: a large boa constrictor slid down the staircase.
question: Right after hearing the gunshot and before the officer reaches her door, what will she most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Keep her door shut and stay inside to avoid the boa.
answer_without_knowledge: Open her door and peek into the hallway, calling to ask what’s going on.
